discord.description: Discord mod settings: OAuth2 login/registration and DM notifications.

clientId.description: Discord application "Client ID". Required for Discord login.

clientSecret.description: Discord application "Client Secret". Required for Discord login.

botToken.description: Bot token used to DM users their notifications. Required for Discord notifications. The bot must share a mutual guild with each recipient.

publicKey.description: Discord application public key (Developer Portal → General Information). Required for slash commands (verifies the interactions endpoint signature).

redirectUri.description: Optional override of the OAuth callback URL. Defaults to `<request origin>/api/auth/discord/callback`. Must be registered as a redirect URI in the Discord app settings.
